requestBody.description:
# revenue_accelerator.conversation_analysis_completed
Zoom triggers this event after the ZRA users conversation analysis is completed.
## Prerequisites
* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Revenue Accelerator conversations analysis completed** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_conversation:read:admin`,`iq_conversation:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:conversations`,`zra:read:conversations:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.conversation_analysis_completed`

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who recorded the conversation.

host_id.description: The conversation host's Zoom user ID.

engagement_id.description: The ID of the engagement in Zoom Contact Center (ZCC) that this conversation is associated with. Present only when the conversation source is ZOOM_CONTACT_CENTER.

event_ts.description: A timestamp at which the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who recorded the conversation.

host_id.description: The conversation host's Zoom user ID.

engagement_id.description: The ID of the engagement in Zoom Contact Center (ZCC) that this conversation is associated with. Present only when the conversation source is ZOOM_CONTACT_CENTER.

requestBody.description:
# revenue_accelerator.playlist_remove_moment
Zoom triggers this event when a ZRA user removes a moment from a playlist.
## Prerequisites
* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Remove Moment From Playlist** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_playlist:read:admin`,`iq_playlist:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:list_conversation_playlists`,`zra:read:list_conversation_playlists:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.playlist_remove_moment`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who removed the moment.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who added the moment to the playlist, represented by email.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the playlist from which the moment was removed.

playlist_name.description: The name of the playlist from which the moment was removed.

playlist_detail_id.description: The ID representing the relationship between the playlist and the moment.

moment_id.description: The ID of the removed moment.

moment_name.description: The name of the removed moment.

update_time.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds) when the moment was removed from the playlist.

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who removed the moment.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who added the moment to the playlist, represented by email.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the playlist from which the moment was removed.

playlist_name.description: The name of the playlist from which the moment was removed.

playlist_detail_id.description: The ID representing the relationship between the playlist and the moment.

moment_id.description: The ID of the removed moment.

moment_name.description: The name of the removed moment.

update_time.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds) when the moment was removed from the playlist.

# revenue_accelerator.playlist_add_moment
Zoom triggers this event when a ZRA user adds a moment to a playlist.
## Prerequisites
* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Add Moment To Playlist** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_playlist:read:admin`,`iq_playlist:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:list_conversation_playlists`,`zra:read:list_conversation_playlists:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.playlist_add_moment`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who added the moment to the playlist, represented by email.

object.description: Details about adding the moment to the playlist.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the playlist the moment was added to.

playlist_name.description: The name of the playlist the moment was added to.

playlist_detail_id.description: The ID representing the relationship between the playlist and the moment.

moment_id.description: The ID of the moment that was added to the playlist.

moment_name.description: The name of the moment that was added to the playlist.

update_time.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds) when the moment was added to the playlist.

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who added the moment to the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who added the moment to the playlist, represented by email.

object.description: Details about adding the moment to the playlist.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the playlist the moment was added to.

playlist_name.description: The name of the playlist the moment was added to.

playlist_detail_id.description: The ID representing the relationship between the playlist and the moment.

moment_id.description: The ID of the moment that was added to the playlist.

moment_name.description: The name of the moment that was added to the playlist.

update_time.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds) when the moment was added to the playlist.

Zoom triggers this event when a ZRA user creates a playlist.

# revenue_accelerator.post_comment_completed
Zoom triggers this event after a ZRA user comments on a conversation.
## Prerequisites
* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Post Comments On Conversation** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_comment:read:admin`,`iq_comment:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:list_conversation_comments`,`zra:read:list_conversation_comments:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.post_comment_completed`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID under which the comment was created.

operator_id.description: The unique identifier of the user who posted the comment.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who posted the comment, represented by email.

comment_id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

conversation_id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation being commented on.

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID under which the comment was created.

operator_id.description: The unique identifier of the user who posted the comment.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who posted the comment, represented by email.

comment_id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

conversation_id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation being commented on.

# revenue_accelerator.playlist_delete
Zoom triggers this event when a ZRA user deletes a playlist.
## Prerequisites
* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with the following configurations:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Playlist Deleted** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_playlist:read:admin`,`iq_playlist:read`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:list_conversation_playlists`,`zra:read:list_conversation_playlists:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.playlist_delete`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who deleted the playlist.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who deleted the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who deleted the playlist, represented by email.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the deleted playlist.

playlist_name.description: The name of the deleted playlist.

delete_time.description: The timestamp when the playlist was deleted, in milliseconds.

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The account ID of the user who deleted the playlist.

operator_id.description: The ID of the user who deleted the playlist.

operator.description: The identifier of the user who deleted the playlist, represented by email.

playlist_id.description: The ID of the deleted playlist.

playlist_name.description: The name of the deleted playlist.

delete_time.description: The timestamp when the playlist was deleted, in milliseconds.

requestBody.description:
# revenue_accelerator.conversation_crm_associations_changed
This event is triggered when the ZRA conversation associations with CRM objects are changed.

## Prerequisites

* A Pro or higher plan.
* **Event Subscriptions** must be enabled for your [Marketplace app](https://marketplace.zoom.us/user/build) with:
	* A valid **Event Notification Endpoint URL**
	* The **Revenue Accelerator conversation CRM objects changed** subscription must be enabled under the **Revenue Accelerator** event.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `iq_conversation:read`,`iq_conversation:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `zra:read:conversation_crm_associations`,`zra:read:conversation_crm_associations:admin`

**Event type**: `revenue_accelerator.conversation_crm_associations_changed`

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The Zoom account ID where the changes occurred.

object.description: Incremental changes of conversation associations with CRM objects.

old_associations.description: List of CRM object IDs whose associations with the conversation will be removed.

new_associations.description: List of CRM object IDs to be associated with the conversation.

event_ts.description: The timestamp when the event occurred.

account_id.description: The Zoom account ID where the changes occurred.

object.description: Incremental changes of conversation associations with CRM objects.

old_associations.description: List of CRM object IDs whose associations with the conversation will be removed.

new_associations.description: List of CRM object IDs to be associated with the conversation.
